title: The Egghead Siege Begins
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Kujaku, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Sanji, Saturn as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did I take out the real one too?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmmm, hooow strange. vegapunk's not here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hold on, let me in, vega- punk!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's gotten into you? You look like you're gonna burst a blood vessel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You no good marine Brigands! Don't you dare lay a finger on her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll be damned if I stand by while a little girl gets murdered!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
